title: World Bank Data Team | DEC Data Team
gist: A World Bank DEC Data Team index page listing years of Data Blog posts; substantive signal is limited to a few historical data headlines on debt, growth, and income classifications embedded in the post list.

insights.claim: The World Bank's International Debt Statistics 2018 reported that BRIC countries doubled bilateral lending commitments to low-income countries in 2016 to $84 billion.
insights.speaker: World Bank Data Team
insights.so_what: Documents the early-scale rise of BRIC (especially China) bilateral lending to low-income countries, the backdrop to today's sovereign-debt-distress dynamics.
insights.quote: International Debt Statistics 2018 shows BRICs doubled bilateral lending commitments to low-income countries in 2016 to $84 billion

insights.claim: The World Bank Data Blog issues quarterly World Development Indicators updates and annual income-classification revisions on a consistent cadence spanning more than a decade.
insights.speaker: World Bank Data Team
insights.so_what: The predictable quarterly WDI and annual classification cadence is a reliable calendar for refreshing emerging-market macro datasets.
insights.locator: New country classifications by income level
